title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - ECIL - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at ECIL. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Ahmedabad-based team.

About ECIL:
ECIL is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL!
